db:select.doc:name: Get Customer Data
db:select.db:sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.account_number, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, c.phone, c.service_street, c.service_city, c.service_state, c.service_zip, c.service_latitude, c.service_longitude, ep.avg_monthly_usage, ep.peak_usage_hours, ep.seasonal_pattern FROM customers c LEFT JOIN energy_profiles ep ON c.customer_id = ep.customer_id WHERE c.customer_id = :customerId

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Customer not found", "message": "Customer with ID " ++ attributes.uriParams.customerId ++ " does not exist" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Database connection error", "message": "Unable to connect to billing system" }

logger.message: Fetching usage data for customer: #[attributes.uriParams.customerId], period: #[vars.period]

db:select.doc:name: Get Usage Data
db:select.db:sql: SELECT u.customer_id, u.usage_date, u.kwh_used, u.peak_demand, u.off_peak_usage, u.cost_per_kwh, AVG(u.kwh_used) OVER (PARTITION BY u.customer_id) as daily_average, SUM(u.kwh_used) OVER (PARTITION BY u.customer_id) as total_kwh FROM usage_data u WHERE u.customer_id = :customerId AND u.usage_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(:startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(:endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY u.usage_date DESC

db:select.doc:name: Get Comparison Data
db:select.db:sql: SELECT AVG(neighborhood.kwh_used) as neighborhood_avg, AVG(similar.kwh_used) as similar_homes_avg, prev.total_kwh as previous_period_total FROM usage_data current LEFT JOIN usage_data neighborhood ON ST_DWithin(current.coordinates, neighborhood.coordinates, 1000) LEFT JOIN usage_data similar ON similar.home_type = current.home_type AND similar.home_size_range = current.home_size_range LEFT JOIN ( SELECT customer_id, SUM(kwh_used) as total_kwh FROM usage_data WHERE customer_id = :customerId AND usage_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(:prevStartDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(:prevEndDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY customer_id ) prev ON prev.customer_id = current.customer_id WHERE current.customer_id = :customerId AND current.usage_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(:startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(:endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Database error", "message": "Unable to retrieve usage data" }

logger.message: Fetching hourly usage data for customer: #[attributes.uriParams.customerId]

db:select.doc:name: Get Hourly Usage
db:select.db:sql: SELECT hu.timestamp, hu.kwh_used as usage, hu.cost, wu.temperature FROM hourly_usage hu LEFT JOIN weather_data wu ON DATE(hu.timestamp) = wu.date WHERE hu.customer_id = :customerId AND hu.timestamp BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP(:startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_TIMESTAMP(:endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY hu.timestamp

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map { timestamp: $.timestamp, usage: $.usage, cost: $.cost, (temperature: $.temperature) if $.temperature != null }

db:select.doc:name: Get Current Bill
db:select.db:sql: SELECT b.bill_id, b.amount, b.due_date, b.period_start, b.period_end, b.status, b.energy_charges, b.delivery_charges, b.taxes, b.fees FROM bills b WHERE b.customer_id = :customerId AND b.status IN ('CURRENT', 'OVERDUE') ORDER BY b.due_date DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

db:select.doc:name: Get Payment History
db:select.db:sql: SELECT p.bill_id, p.amount, p.payment_date, p.payment_method FROM payments p WHERE p.customer_id = :customerId ORDER BY p.payment_date DESC FETCH FIRST 12 ROWS ONLY

logger.message: Setting up payment plan for customer: #[attributes.uriParams.customerId]

validation:is-number.doc:name: Validate Number of Payments
validation:is-number.message: Number of payments must be a number

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Payment Plan
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO payment_plans ( plan_id, customer_id, plan_type, number_of_payments, preferred_date, created_date, status ) VALUES ( :planId, :customerId, :planType, :numberOfPayments, :preferredDate, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE' )
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ planId: vars.planId, customerId: attributes.uriParams.customerId, planType: payload.planType, numberOfPayments: payload.numberOfPayments, preferredDate: payload.preferredDate }]
